overall.description: Third-person gameplay from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a medieval rural village with thatched-roof huts during golden hour. The character travels along a dirt path past villagers and wooden fences, transitioning from the village center to open countryside with smoke visible from distant fires.

walking past burned wooden ruins on the left side

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the dirt path toward the village center, swords on back

notable_agents.action: villager carrying logs on shoulder walking toward camera

entered.detail: winding dirt trail through the village
rough wooden log fence lining the path

tall leafy tree beside the path

segments.scene_description: Geralt approaches a rural village during golden hour, walking along a dirt path lined with wooden fences. A villager carrying logs passes by on the right, while burned ruins of structures appear on the left. Dark smoke rises in the distance above the thatched-roof huts.

scene_state.functional_zone: village center with notice board and market area

events.description: passing wooden notice board with red hollyhock flowers

agents.ego_description: Geralt continuing through the village center past houses and villagers

notable_agents.action: villager standing near notice board looking at postings

entered.detail: wooden board with paper postings and red flowers beside it
tall red flowers growing beside the notice board
yellow and black banner hanging near buildings

segments.scene_description: Walking through the village center, Geralt passes a wooden notice board adorned with red hollyhock flowers on the right. The path winds between closely packed thatched-roof huts, with villagers visible near their homes and a banner flag visible on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural countryside exit with open fields

events.description: exiting village into open fields and countryside

agents.ego_description: Geralt leaving the village behind and entering the open countryside

entered.detail: grassy open field extending to the horizon
dense tree line visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: Geralt exits the village into wide open countryside, with grassy fields stretching to a distant forest tree line. The wooden fence continues alongside the path but becomes more sparse, and the dense housing gives way to open natural landscape under a partly cloudy sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a war-torn rural village into a wide, open countryside during the golden hour. It begins with Geralt walking along a dirt path lined with wooden fences, passing a villager carrying logs and the charred ruins of structures as dark smoke rises above thatched-roof huts. As the camera moves into the village center, the path winds between closely packed homes and a wooden notice board adorned with red hollyhock flowers. The scene then opens up as Geralt exits the settlement, with the dense housing giving way to expansive grassy fields and a sparse fence line. Finally, the view expands toward a distant forest tree line under a partly cloudy sky, completing the shift from the confined village to the natural landscape.
